title: Chatbot session messages not persisting across pages
symptom: When navigating between pages in the embedded chatbot, the entire conversation is lost. Users expect the chat history to persist during browsing.
root_cause: The issue arises from incorrect session management in the chatbot's configuration. Specifically, the session ID is not being maintained across page loads, leading to new sessions being created instead of loading the existing conversation.
fix_steps: Ensure the session ID is stored in localStorage and retrieved correctly.
Set 'loadPreviousSession' to true in the chat initialization code.
Pass the actual session ID variable instead of the string 'sessionId' in the metadata.
agent_instruction: Update the chatbot code to manage the session ID correctly and ensure proper configuration in the n8n workflow.
